hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' 2>/dev/null); echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^\s*git\s+commit' || exit 0; BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$BRANCH" ] || [ "$BRANCH" = "main" ] && exit 0; AHEAD=$(git rev-list --count main..HEAD 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$AHEAD" ] || [ "$AHEAD" = "0" ] && exit 0; FIRST=$(git log main..HEAD --format=%ct --reverse 2>/dev/null | head -1); NOW=$(date +%s); AGE_H=0; [ -n "$FIRST" ] && AGE_H=$(( (NOW - FIRST) / 3600 )); if [ "$AHEAD" -ge 3 ] || [ "$AGE_H" -ge 2 ]; then MSG="You have $AHEAD commit(s) on branch '$BRANCH' not yet in main."; [ "$AGE_H" -ge 2 ] && MSG="$MSG Branch is ${AGE_H}h old."; MSG="$MSG If the build passes, consider merging to main to deploy."; echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"$MSG\"}"; fi
